caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual map displayed on the screen. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small inset window, wearing headphones and speaking to the audience. The central diagram illustrates various concepts related to systems thinking, such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," "buying & selling," and "future of society," all interconnected with arrows suggesting relationships and processes. A pop-up box in the center of the screen provides additional information, categorizing systems into simple and complex types, and participants into unitary and pluralist perspectives. The overall content seems to explore how different aspects of systems thinking can be applied to understand and address complex problems in society.
